failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing one matching item priced at $46.13 and answered that there were no matches.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to answer which available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle costs more than $45.76. The agent correctly planned and called ProductCatalogSearch, and the tool returned one matching item with price 46.13, which is greater than 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer: that no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved the bad answer.
